_comment: GoVallecito business directory. Three tiers: 'featured' (paid partner — rich card, pinned top of category + featured strip, own profile page), 'verified' (Verified Local badge + full contact row), 'basic' (free list row). EDITORS: add/maintain businesses here; partners email changes. Only include contact fields that are actually verified — omit unknowns (do not guess emails/socials/hours). Web-research was blocked this session, so most non-partner email/social/hours fields are intentionally omitted pending verification.

businesses.name: Pine River Lodge
businesses.blurb: Cabins and lodge rooms right on the Pine River — a Vallecito mainstay for families and anglers.

businesses.name: Julie Coffelt — Coldwell Banker Mountain Properties
businesses.blurb: Vallecito local realtor — 23 years in the Four Corners, 15 of them living at the lake. Honest, year-round guidance from a neighbor who's here to stay.

businesses.name: Vallecito Marina & Yacht Club
businesses.blurb: Boat rentals, slips, on-the-water fuel, and the social hub of the lake.

businesses.name: Fisher Guide Service
businesses.blurb: Guided fishing and ice fishing on Vallecito.

businesses.name: Vallecito Lake Outfitters
businesses.blurb: Horseback rides, backcountry pack trips, and guided fishing.

businesses.name: Charter Vallecito
businesses.blurb: Charter fishing trips on the lake.

businesses.name: Go Fish Durango
businesses.blurb: Guided fishing trips around Durango and Vallecito.

businesses.name: Altitude ATV & Side-by-Side Rentals
businesses.blurb: ATV and side-by-side rentals for the forest roads.

businesses.name: Vallecito Lake Country Market & La Comida Ranchera
businesses.blurb: Market, deli, and La Comida Ranchera kitchen — plus gas, including non-ethanol fuel, ideal for boats, ATVs, and small engines.

businesses.name: Pine River Irrigation District (PRID)
businesses.blurb: Reservoir recreation permits and published lake levels.

businesses.name: Bayfield Realty
businesses.blurb: Local real estate brokerage on CR 501.

businesses.name: Rocky Mountain General Store & Custom Meats
